# Workspace

## Overview

**Fit Finder** ‚Äî An AI-powered outfit builder where users type an outfit idea or inspiration, get multiple swipable looks generated by AI, and can purchase items directly or save outfits for later.

pnpm workspace monorepo using TypeScript. Each package manages its own dependencies.

## Stack

- **Monorepo tool**: pnpm workspaces
- **Node.js version**: 24
- **Package manager**: pnpm
- **TypeScript version**: 5.9
- **API framework**: Express 5
- **Database**: PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
- **Validation**: Zod (`zod/v4`), `drizzle-zod`
- **API codegen**: Orval (from OpenAPI spec)
- **Build**: esbuild (CJS bundle)
- **AI**: OpenAI (via Replit AI Integrations) - gpt-5.2 for outfit generation
- **Frontend**: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion

## Features

1. **Outfit Generation**: Type a prompt ‚Üí AI generates 3 complete outfit looks
2. **Swipable Looks**: Browse looks with swipe/arrow navigation and dot indicators
3. **Item Details**: Each look shows all items (Top, Bottom, Shoes, Bag, Jewelry, Makeup, Hair) with brand, price, and direct purchase links
4. **Order Modal**: Pick a look, see total cost, enter sizes (top/bottom/shoes/dress), save to favorites
5. **Saved Looks**: Grid of saved outfits with details and delete functionality

## Structure

```text
artifacts-monorepo/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ artifacts/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ api-server/         # Express API server
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ fit-finder/         # React + Vite frontend (previewPath: /)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ lib/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ api-spec/           # OpenAPI spec + Orval codegen config
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ api-client-react/   # Generated React Query hooks
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ api-zod/            # Generated Zod schemas from OpenAPI
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ db/                 # Drizzle ORM schema + DB connection
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ integrations-openai-ai-server/  # OpenAI server client + image/audio utilities
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ integrations-openai-ai-react/  # OpenAI React hooks
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ scripts/                # Utility scripts
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pnpm-workspace.yaml
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ tsconfig.base.json
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ tsconfig.json
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ package.json
```

## API Routes

- `GET /api/healthz` ‚Äî Health check
- `POST /api/outfits/generate` ‚Äî Generate outfit looks from a prompt
- `GET /api/outfits/saved` ‚Äî Get all saved outfits
- `GET /api/outfits/saved/:id` ‚Äî Get a specific saved outfit
- `DELETE /api/outfits/saved/:id` ‚Äî Delete a saved outfit
- `POST /api/outfits/save` ‚Äî Save an outfit with optional sizes

## Database Tables

- `saved_outfits` ‚Äî Stores saved outfit looks (prompt, look JSON, userSizes JSON, savedAt)

## Environment Variables

- `DATABASE_URL` ‚Äî PostgreSQL connection string (auto-provisioned)
- `AI_INTEGRATIONS_OPENAI_BASE_URL` ‚Äî Replit AI Integrations proxy URL
- `AI_INTEGRATIONS_OPENAI_API_KEY` ‚Äî Replit AI Integrations key

## TypeScript & Composite Projects

Every package extends `tsconfig.base.json` which sets `composite: true`. The root `tsconfig.json` lists all packages as project references.

- Always typecheck from root: `pnpm run typecheck`
- `emitDeclarationOnly` ‚Äî only emit `.d.ts` files during typecheck

## Root Scripts

- `pnpm run build` ‚Äî runs `typecheck` first, then recursively runs `build`
- `pnpm run typecheck` ‚Äî runs `tsc --build --emitDeclarationOnly`

## Packages

### `artifacts/api-server` (`@workspace/api-server`)

Express 5 API server. Routes live in `src/routes/`:
- `src/routes/health.ts` ‚Äî health check
- `src/routes/outfits.ts` ‚Äî outfit generation and management

### `artifacts/fit-finder` (`@workspace/fit-finder`)

React + Vite frontend. Pages in `src/pages/`, components in `src/components/`.

### `lib/db` (`@workspace/db`)

Database layer. Schema in `src/schema/outfits.ts`.

- `pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push` ‚Äî push schema changes
